project_context.archetype: 5 (Luxury / Cinematic / Moody) infused with Dark Fantasy Gaming
project_context.visual_style: Dark, Guild Wars 2-inspired (deep reds/golds, fantasy feel, parchment accents).

primary_heading.usage: Hero headers, major section titles. Gives an epic lore and fantasy feeling.

secondary_heading.usage: Overlines, labels, small caps text, button text.

body.usage: Paragraphs, feature descriptions, UI text. Maintains modern readability.

monospace.usage: Command syntax, code blocks, copy-to-clipboard text.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing, optical alignment, layered cinematic textures.

hero.layout: Min 80vh, center-aligned content, layered background with heavy red smoke/landscape overlay.
hero.buttons: Primary ('Add to Discord'): Red-900 background with amber-100 text, soft red glow. Secondary ('Copy URL'): Transparent with amber-500 border and text. MUST have data-testid.

navbar.style: Crystal Glass variant. bg-stone-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-amber-500/10. Sticky top-0 z-50.
navbar.links: Hover state: text-amber-500 transition-colors duration-300. Active state: text-amber-400 font-bold.

cards.style: Dark parchment feel. bg-stone-900/60 backdrop-blur-md border border-amber-500/20 hover:border-amber-500/50 transition-all duration-300.

commands_list.structure: Shadcn Tabs (Member vs Admin). Inner content uses Card or Accordion per command.
commands_list.styling: Command name in JetBrains Mono text-amber-500. Description in text-stone-300.

pages_structure.name: Home
sections: Hero: Title 'GW2 Roster Bot', Subtitle 'Automate your Guild Wars 2 Discord community.', Buttons: Add to Discord & Copy Invite URL
Quick Features Teaser: 3 small blocks highlighting core value
CTA to view full guide and features

pages_structure.name: How to Add
sections: Step-by-step vertical guide timeline: 1. Click Add to Discord, 2. Authorize Permissions, 3. Run /setup in your server

pages_structure.name: Features
sections: - GW2 account verification with role assignment + auto nickname
- Item search with trading post buy/sell prices and autocomplete

pages_structure.name: Commands
sections: Tabs: Member Commands vs Admin Commands

hero_background.description: Dark fantasy landscape for hero section background

red_smoke_overlay.description: Red smoke to overlay on top of the hero background for cinematic GW2 feeling

texture_gold.description: Metallic foil for subtle texture inside cards or feature blocks

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a React SPA with react-router-dom containing multiple pages: Home, How to Add, Features, Commands.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-bot-btn', data-testid='copy-invite-btn').
Implement 'copy to clipboard' functionality using navigator.clipboard.writeText with the exact discord invite URL. Show a success toast using Sonner.
Use lucide-react for icons (Swords, Shield, Search, Settings, ShieldAlert, etc.).
Load Google Fonts: 'Cormorant Garamond' (Headings), 'Cinzel' (Subheadings), 'Outfit' (Body), and 'JetBrains Mono' (Commands). Do NOT use generic Inter.
Build the commands section using Shadcn Tabs to separate 'Member Commands' and 'Admin Commands'.
Include the GitHub link in the global Footer.
Use Framer Motion for entrance animations (fade up on scroll, smooth page transitions).
Ensure high contrast and accessibility while keeping the dark, cinematic Guild Wars 2 theme intact.
